List all tasks

Source: R/rrq_task.R
rrq_task_list.Rd

List all tasks. This may be a lot of tasks, and so can be quite slow to execute.

Usage

rrq_task_list(controller = NULL)

Arguments

controller

The controller to use. If not given (or NULL) we'll use the controller registered with rrq_default_controller_set().

Value

A character vector

Examples


obj <- rrq_controller("rrq:example")

rrq_task_list(controller = obj)
#>  [1] "a1cd9da0ed69d53ec5cdb85521376531" "bf5d72b5899abd37c31015a0c752c7d4"
#>  [3] "ffdeae288ccaa0f368b7ef43c82dc5cc" "6b6d1e562a9f7bb877d5954139ebb55a"
#>  [5] "1ebb59a2b5f08604245f78bf04a44bd1" "a739f80c1df06228b8b336ac278756a6"
#>  [7] "05f7c28c383079f9182839262b1377e7" "369c33b08f6d73d73b6f293effe9d30c"
#>  [9] "26d98cf7ac604a67255b25e87a726414" "471c37b5f7c76cff9167f6303edcc547"
#> [11] "3979ea6783b2175a0ea492d87fbcf3c4" "812c729739b47573cf17e3f3cdea6683"
#> [13] "0431aad86264281880b35ee2b1e220d2" "784c2838ce2ce34182b5e5c1e803b4bc"
#> [15] "8853b5ae75768f57e4b8a293858d2adb" "90e897e20e66fc70436150ebcbe29e6a"
#> [17] "eabb3c3257228ff99b7122530f9802b3" "7ee5f52d4a5cd31e1da0f833adbe3325"
#> [19] "51f187ad1bf5ce084ef9e3c76cc8469a" "02df37a694ac36f3a3680813a70f5d63"
#> [21] "b31f22bb888b6119c71616e7ceb4b1bb" "b24c43c1c65bc801ca35092b2c167559"
#> [23] "39a56294c2ee98d4ca5e1733ef291a43" "02853230cee5166e7ad82f768742583f"
#> [25] "3d7fbaa35ce474b9cbb7c3ef8a471087" "e135d2f2526ffc3b40db2c3b5659a4d5"
#> [27] "cb3dd28ecf9c49f04e7da7d49ce7f020" "f243744610b66aa30a7cd10eb15ad768"
#> [29] "6665c927f7fe435822143873bb07cc85" "e3f08c3a290ec3411f8a0f87248fac7f"
#> [31] "4f130db5c7af0112f16ffca7bb0990be" "708fe800933758e58d4e49b60aa3875e"
#> [33] "5a542de477901512f7eacba0b42a39f8" "007f1a9bdaa4f237454111c62b1b8609"
#> [35] "1e8c32d5fd60e310b96e09415a2dc901" "bf847e89547bbda62b06f972833cc0eb"
#> [37] "c02f15cd46bb942001b76ec98c3f0911" "0cbe4f25ce1f689e4fe0d4638a885d43"
#> [39] "768c6be3bc08aca9b5416928dde8c128" "a18f929f2e24177f266822a45e0d9aa1"
#> [41] "739145dd810daef9cdb25c051f67ceae" "37097e6a9c96935e575fc80a8796dbb7"
#> [43] "a431744bba10c30abdaee3a2098e6e20" "2bd05f55d945a6d70f30eadfcabc1317"
